# Prasad Subrahmanya - Personal Portfolio & Blog

> Personal website and blog of Prasad Subrahmanya, founder and software engineer based in Oslo, Norway.

## About

Prasad Subrahmanya is a technical founder with 12+ years of experience building software products. Currently Founder & CEO at Luminik, an event pipeline platform for B2B teams. Previously built Aura at Bain & Company ($3.6M ARR) and led Mainteny to a $2.7M seed round.

## Site Structure

- Homepage: https://prasad.tech/
- Blog: https://prasad.tech/blog/
- Contact: https://prasad.tech/#contact

## Blog Articles

### Engineering
- [A Dedicated Mac Mini for Luminik's Agents](https://prasad.tech/blog/dedicated-mac-mini-solo-startup.html) - Moving Luminik's scheduled agent work onto a dedicated Mac Mini M4 running Hermes Agent, Claude Code via ACP delegation, and a local gbrain knowledge base. Includes concrete writeups of three upstream bugs with links and repros.
- [gstack, CLAUDE.md, and the Work That Frameworks Don't Cover](https://prasad.tech/blog/gstack-solo-builder.html) - Comparing gstack's approach to CLAUDE.md files and specs-driven development for solo product work
- [What It Actually Costs to Build a Serious Product Alone in 2026](https://prasad.tech/blog/building-alone-in-2026.html) - The real cost structure of solo product development with AI tools

### Founder Journey
- [Selling Before Building at Luminik](https://prasad.tech/blog/selling-before-building.html) - How manual delivery became Luminik's first customer and product shape

### Event Marketing
- [Event ROI Breaks in the Handoffs](https://prasad.tech/blog/event-marketing-roi.html) - Why event attribution fails when the shared record breaks across tools

### Side Projects
- [Side Projects That Lead to Unexpected Discoveries](https://prasad.tech/blog/snowflake-cost-optimization.html) - How SnowOptix led to Luminik

### Sales
- [How Technical Founders Can Sell](https://prasad.tech/blog/technical-founder-sales.html) - Using technical depth to run clearer sales calls

### Startup Journey
- [Building a $3.6M ARR Product Inside a Consulting Firm](https://prasad.tech/blog/zero-to-one-bain.html) - Lessons from building Aura at Bain & Company

### Fundraising
- [What Raising a Seed Round Actually Took](https://prasad.tech/blog/raising-seed-round.html) - Six months, 87 investor conversations, and the cost of context switching during a raise

### Product Development
- [From Idea to MVP in 3 Months as the Only Developer](https://prasad.tech/blog/mvp-three-months.html) - Building Mainteny's MVP as sole technical person

## Topics Covered

- Startup founding and entrepreneurship
- Technical leadership and engineering
- Product development and MVP building
- B2B sales for technical founders
- AI-assisted development and tooling
- Event marketing and GTM strategy
- Venture building inside large organizations
- Seed fundraising and investor relations

## Current Venture: Luminik

[Luminik](https://www.luminik.io) is an event pipeline platform for B2B teams. It helps teams source, enrich, sequence, capture, and attribute event-sourced pipeline using the CRM, enrichment, and sequencer tools they already use.

The problem: teams can usually account for event spend, but the buyer signal gets split across attendee sources, enrichment tools, sequencers, booth notes, and CRM records.

Luminik solves this by preserving one event record across the full workflow, from target sourcing to CRM attribution.

## Professional Experience

- **[Luminik](https://www.luminik.io)** (Oct 2024 - Present): Founder & CEO - event pipeline platform
- **SnowOptix** (Jan 2024 - Oct 2024): Founder - Snowflake cost optimization side project; adopted by a top-3 global consulting firm; wound down to focus on Luminik
- **Bain & Company** (2022 - 2024): Venture CTO - Built Aura PE due diligence platform
- **Mainteny** (2021 - 2022): CTO & Co-founder - CRM for maintenance companies

## Technical Stack

The blog covers technical topics including:
- Backend: Spring Boot, Quarkus, Python, FastAPI
- Frontend: React, Next.js
- Infrastructure: AWS, Kubernetes, ECS
- Data: Snowflake, PostgreSQL
- AI/ML: LLMs, Claude, GPT, Cursor, Claude Code
